data.title: TransUnion Reports Strong Q3: Double-Digit Gains Across US And International Markets, Boosts FY24 Outlook
data.description: TransUnion shares rise after reporting Q3 results of $1.085B revenue, above estimates, and optimistic FY24 outlook.

data.title: Thermo Fisher Scientific Sails Through Q3 With Mixed Earnings, CEO Says In Great Position To Deliver 2024 Objectives
data.description: Thermo Fisher Scientific's Q3 revenue of $10.59 billion missed expectations. Adjusted EPS beat estimates but dropped year-over-year. Guidance for 2024 remains reaffirmed.

data.title: Bank Of America CEO Cautions Fed Not To 'Go Too Fast Or Too Slow' On Interest Rate Cuts
data.description: Bank of America CEO Brian Moynihan has cautioned the Federal Reserve against implementing overly aggressive interest rate cuts.

data.title: Starbucks Halloween-Themed 'Wicked' Drinks Hit Stores Alongside New Movie Merch Amid Weak Q4 Prelim Results
data.description: These themed drinks were made available from Oct. 22 in the U.S., Canada, and select international locations.

data.title: AdvisorShares MSOS Climbs 8% As Cannabis Rescheduling Sparks Investor Interest
data.description: AdvisorShares MSOS ETF surges 8% as U.S. cannabis reform nears. Explore key investment signals and market opportunities.
